case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC VS. LINDSEY CHOCHOLA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.
